steps.title: Open the Spotify Developer Dashboard
steps.text: Open the Spotify Developer Dashboard and click Create app.

steps.title: Create your app
steps.text: Enter an app name and a short app description. Then create the app.

steps.title: Copy Client ID and Client Secret
steps.text: Copy the Client ID and Client Secret from your Spotify app.

steps.title: Copy the Redirect URL
steps.text: Copy the Redirect URL from godisalotachat.

steps.title: Save and connect Spotify
steps.text: Save the app settings, then save your credentials and start the Spotify sign-in.
